_comment: Model bank: every model you can hand to `gpt summarize --model <name>`. Each entry maps a MODEL NAME to its PROVIDER and the options that provider needs, so you can run a model by name alone — the provider and required options are populated from here. `gpt summarize` with no arguments prints this bank. Installed Ollama models are also auto-discovered from the live host and merged in, so they resolve even if not listed below. Add personal/extra models in config/models.local.json (gitignored, same shape).

models.name: codex
models.note: ChatGPT-plan default; richest prose, reliable on large bundles

models.name: claude
models.note: Claude plan (monthly Agent SDK credit pool)

models.name: auto
models.note: Cursor Auto router — unlimited on paid plans (routes per call)

models.name: composer-2.5
models.note: Cursor first-party; free Auto+Composer pool (stable choice)

models.name: gpt-5.5-medium
models.note: Cursor frontier — draws your API credit pool

models.name: claude-4.6-sonnet-medium-thinking
models.note: Cursor frontier — draws your API credit pool

models.name: qwen2.5-coder:14b
models.note: fast bulk classification of small/medium bundles
